prompt: A dreamy anime end-card illustration of a relaxed young woman sitting sideways in a whimsical library of roses and books, surrounded by floating petals and open books. She has vivid purple hair in a high ponytail tied with a black scrunchie, loose bangs, small gold earrings, and a tiny gold hair clip reading "AI" near her bangs. Her face is mostly obscured by a soft rectangular blur, but the composition still treats her as the central heroine. She wears a turquoise T-shirt with large white text AITuber, an oversized pastel windbreaker in icy blue with pink paint-splatter accents, and pale denim shorts. She holds 1 red rose in her right hand and 1 dark blue hardcover book in her left hand titled Roses & Books. Pose her lounging casually with one leg extended and one bent, like a stylish anime ending-card key visual. The setting is an ornate fantasy reading nook with 2 towering stacks of books framing her on the left and right, entwined with blooming rose vines in red and pink. Include exactly 6 clearly readable book spines or covers with decorative serif titles: "Poems & Books", "Roses & Books", "Dreams", "Memories", "Letters", and "Language of Flowers". Add 1 takeaway coffee cup at the lower left with the printed phrase Read. Write. Bloom.. Place 1 open notebook with a pen in the foreground near her legs, showing a rose sketch and notes, plus 1 additional open illustrated botanical book at the lower right. In the upper area, include exactly 4 floating open books and several loose pages drifting in the air. Behind her, create a bright arched window revealing a pastel fairytale city with a cathedral-like spire against a clear sky-blue background. Fill the whole image with scattered red and pink rose petals, sparkles, soft painterly light, decorative floral details, and richly colored book covers in navy, pink, and cream. Use polished anime illustration styling, highly detailed linework, luminous pastel highlights, romantic fantasy atmosphere, balanced symmetrical framing, and the feel of a commemorative spring book-and-rose themed visual for Sant Jordi Day.
